testsuite.name: tests.PositiveLambdaTest

testcase.name: Заполнение всех полей формы студента, и проверка на соответствие

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 400. Message: Requested environment is not available Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-A8CGM4F', ip: '192.168.88.214' Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' selenide.remote: https://user1:1234@selenoid.autotests.cloud/wd/hub Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 130, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*, --proxy-bypass-list=<-loopb..., --disable-dev-shm-usage], excludeSwitches: [enable-automation, load-extension], extensions: [], prefs: {credentials_enable_service: false, plugins.always_open_pdf_externally: true, profile.default_content_setting_values.automatic_downloads: 1, safebrowsing.enabled: true}}, pageLoadStrategy: normal, selenoid:options: {enableVNC: true, enableVideo: true}, unhandledPromptBehavior: accept}]}] selenide.url: https://demoqa.com/automation-practice-form Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 130, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*, --proxy-bypass-list=<-loopb..., --disable-dev-shm-usage], excludeSwitches: [enable-automation, load-extension], extensions: [], prefs: {credentials_enable_service: false, plugins.always_open_pdf_externally: true, profile.default_content_setting_values.automatic_downloads: 1, safebrowsing.enabled: true}}, pageLoadStrategy: normal, selenoid:options: {enableVNC: true, enableVideo: true}, unhandledPromptBehavior: accept} selenide.baseUrl: https://demoqa.com
